posts.author: nitram (Martin-D. Lacasse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’ve installed ‘Get Files Public’ on my boards a while ago. Now, these automations all stopped working and only display ‘ok’ on the public file when clicking on the url. I reinstalled to no avail. Has this automation been obsoleted for other paying automations (e.g., Public Files app)?

I’m confused.

Martin

posts.author: YurriMurray (YurriMurray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Martin-D. Lacasse:

I’ve installed ‘Get Files Public’ on my boards a while ago. Now, these Ehallpass automations all stopped working and only display ‘ok’ on the public file when clicking on the url. I reinstalled to no avail. Has this automation been obsoleted for other paying automations (e.g., Public Files app)?

You should checking for updates or replacements, like the Public Files app, if ‘Get Files Public’ automation ceases. Reinstall or seek alternatives.
